audit_items.proof_trace: The payment pull at L453 is structurally unconditional — it sits outside the `if (data.length != 0)` block (L448-450) and executes on every code path. `assetOutAmount` is computed at L442 before any external call and is immutable within the call frame. Reentrancy into `bid()` is blocked by `s_entered = true` set at L418 (before the first external call) and only reset at L457 after the pull completes.
